title: commiphora dalzielii
intro: Commiphora dalzielii, also known as the Dalziel's myrrh tree, is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae, native to West Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of Commiphora dalzielii include relieving digestive issues, treating respiratory problems, and alleviating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Commiphora dalzielii is typically prepared as a resin or oil, which can be used in herbal remedies, topical creams, or taken orally in the form of capsules or tinctures.
